findings.text: Bidirectional coupling: "agent-tool-infrastructure" ↔ "autonomous-agent-core" (3+5 crossings) — consider extracting shared interface

Circular dependencies between agent zones (hench, hench-2, hench-3) suggest need for dependency inversion or interface extraction
Low cohesion and high coupling ratios suggest this zone may need restructuring or merging
